item.title: Dota Win Prediction
item.description: Dota Win Prediction A model to help understand the win probability of the game based on in-game metrics, skill level, and assistance from the hero pool. The model is also used to find the heroes which the player is comfortable with from the 120+ hero pool. Analysis is done to help users understand their weak points based on the hero pool through Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA). Everyone is good at certain heroes, and everyone is bad at others.
